title: Speaker ID
description: Capture and tag reference recordings for known speakers

speakers.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS speakers (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, people_id INTEGER DEFAULT 0)

records.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS records (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, recorder_id INTEGER NOT NULL, speakers_id INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (recorder_id) REFERENCES recorder_records(id), FOREIGN KEY (speakers_id) REFERENCES speakers(id))
